title: Sloe Berries Tagine
description: A traditional North African-inspired stew made with sloe berries, perfect for a cold winter's day.
instructions: Heat the algerian in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the sloe berries, tagine spice mix, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add the water or vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the sloe berries have broken down and the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh berries and a sprinkle of tagine spice mix if desired.
